lineage.Process: ExportFeatures PURE_LIN S:\course\geo877\student\Aiello\Streets_filtered_Zurich.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_LIN.Shape_Length,-1,-1;STR_ESID "STR_ESID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_LIN.STR_ESID,-1,-1;OBJECTID "OBJECTID" false true false 4 Long 0 9,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STN.OBJECTID,-1,-1;STN_ID "STN_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STN.STN_ID,-1,-1;STR_ESID "STR_ESID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STN.STR_ESID,-1,-1;STN_TEXT "STN_TEXT" true true false 60 Text 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STN.STN_TEXT,0,59;STN_INDEX "STN_INDEX" true true false 3 Text 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STN.STN_INDEX,0,2;STN_LANGUAGE "STN_LANGUAGE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STN.STN_LANGUAGE,-1,-1;OBJECTID "OBJECTID" false true false 4 Long 0 9,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.OBJECTID,-1,-1;STR_ESID "STR_ESID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_ESID,-1,-1;COM_FOSNR "COM_FOSNR" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.COM_FOSNR,-1,-1;COM_NAME "COM_NAME" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.COM_NAME,0,39;COM_CANTON "COM_CANTON" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.COM_CANTON,0,1;STR_TYPE "STR_TYPE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_TYPE,-1,-1;STR_STATUS "STR_STATUS" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_STATUS,-1,-1;STR_OFFICIAL "STR_OFFICIAL" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_OFFICIAL,-1,-1;STR_GEOMSRC "STR_GEOMSRC" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_GEOMSRC,-1,-1;STR_PARENT "STR_PARENT" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_PARENT,-1,-1;STR_CHILDREN "STR_CHILDREN" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_CHILDREN,0,39;STR_MODIFIED "STR_MODIFIED" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,PURE_LIN,PURE_STR.STR_MODIFIED,-1,-1" #
